posts.text:
these pies is goood!! thank u love yall






Heaven Reed (@heavenreed19)

Having a great night in Jacksonville! Got to bake up some pies for @theovon and see his comedy show. Theo, you did a great job, man! Take a break and eat some pie now 🥧 and a big thank you to Amanda at @FloridaTheatre for welcoming us to JAX and coordinating everything 💕











— https://nitter.net/heavenreed19/status/2032986389487251780#m

😂 😂


Niner (@California_9ER)

@TheoVon





— https://nitter.net/California_9ER/status/2032938809802051884#m
😂 ima bank somewhere else just to be safe
this is dope!!  but does sand get in the laptops?? i guess u can get a protector for it

Cant make this Baton Rouge! Have shows in Jacksonville this weekend. See yall next year 🙏 ☘️ love yall


The Advocate (@theadvocatebr)

Lane Kiffin and Theo Von join special guest lineup for Baton Rouge St. Patrick's Day parade theadvocate.com/baton_rouge/…





— https://nitter.net/theadvocatebr/status/2028535205141651882#m

🙌🙌 @amasad love what yall are doing. been working on a Replit app project with my friend 🫡🫡


Amjad Masad (@amasad)

Software isn’t merely technical work anymore. It’s creative.

Introducing Replit Agent 4. The first AI built for creative collaboration between humans and agents.

Design on an infinite canvas, work with your team, run parallel agents, and ship working apps, sites, slides & more.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/amasad/status/2031755113694679094#m

🫡 🫡 🙏 @CrosbyMaxx


Maxx Crosby (@CrosbyMaxx)

3/11/20. 

6 Years Sober. 

God Doesn’t Make Mistakes. 🦅💎



— https://nitter.net/CrosbyMaxx/status/2031715073270636869#m

Lotta great folks in this city! Thanks for having me.


ESPN Albuquerque 101.7FM The TEAM (@1017theteam)

Just moments from tip-off of the NMAA 5A Quarterfinals, between Albuquerque High & Sandia... NFL Draft Prospect & former Volcano Vista Hawk, Diego Pavia is in attendance with Comedian Theo Von





— https://nitter.net/1017theteam/status/2031449658883743867#m

Couldnt make it to the @ufc fights this week 😞 Next time!


The jaded life (@THEJADEDLIFE)

I dont see @TheoVon ? Where are you my friend? #UFC326.



— https://nitter.net/THEJADEDLIFE/status/2030440237856391430#m

Thanks for pulling up


James Li (@5149jamesli)

Appreciate the great conversation — together, let’s keep chasing rabbit holes and uniting America @TheoVon 🫡🇺🇸





— https://nitter.net/5149jamesli/status/2027068985351840218#m

thank u Lexington! love this city 🙏


Drew Franklin (@DrewFranklinKSR)

Great time at the opera tonight. @TheoVon can really sing.





— https://nitter.net/DrewFranklinKSR/status/2024323506595418307#m

facts. was one of the best busboys south of phx for prob 28 mos 😤


Adam Kliebenstein (@AdamKliebe)

“Dude, I used to bus tables. I was one of the first bussers in Arizona to use creatine” - @TheoVon to Jason Momoa 😆



— https://nitter.net/AdamKliebe/status/2020514829073567878#m
What are we paying taxes for?

nevermind! 🤝


dan (@Dan16676935420)

Just use ai and call it a day





— https://nitter.net/Dan16676935420/status/2015635693473579205#m

I don’t think I’m gonna make it. So this photo will have to suffice. Give her my best. its gonna be a great card! Lopes is fun to watch


Manny j (@Mannyj07)

My daughter wants a selfie with @TheoVon … are you coming to UFC in Houston ?





— https://nitter.net/Mannyj07/status/2015616937141674181#m
Who was St. Patrick? @CelsiusOfficial #CelsiusBrandPartner
viva Taiwan!! w/ @Ray
talkin ❤️ w/ @Ray
thong fong w/ @Ray
not having it 🤝
Discussing the rise in ADHD with James Nestor.
put em up 🦘🥊 @Chris Hemsworth @CelsiusOfficial #celsiusbrandpartner
just friends!!! @Chris Hemsworth
let your taste decide @Pepsi #PepsiPartner
